---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What limitation does it address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- What would you like to see implemented? How would it work? -->

## Use Case
<!-- How would you use this feature? What's the specific scenario? -->

## Component
<!-- Which component would this feature affect? -->
- [ ] Smart Contract
- [ ] SDK (TypeScript)
- [ ] Indexer (Node.js)
- [ ] Frontend (Next.js)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Would be helpful
- [ ] High - Really need this
- [ ] Critical - Blocking my work

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

## Implementation Details
<!-- Do you have any ideas about how this could be implemented? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here -->

## Contribution
<!-- Would you be willing to help implement this feature? -->
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to help implement this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can provide more technical details
- [ ] No, I prefer the maintainers to handle it

## Confirmation
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I understand this is a volunteer-driven project
- [ ] I have provided enough detail for the team to understand the request
